The '''Fist''' was a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] who served as the [[Supreme Commander|supreme military commander]] for the [[One Sith]]. The Fist was appointed to the position by [[Darth Krayt]]. Until [[130 ABY]], the Fist was [[Darth Nihl]], but he was then made into a [[Hand (One Sith)|Hand]] after his [[Darth Nihl's predecessor|predecessor]] was killed at the [[Massacre at Ossus]].<ref>{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=boards/viewtopic.php?t=12675|thread=Imperial Knights question, post Essential Guide to the Force|nobackup=1}}</ref> As of [[137 ABY]], [[Darth Stryfe]] served as Krayt's Fist, in command of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Service]] alongside [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Morlish Veed]].<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.comicscommunity.com/boards/janduursema/?read=9802|text=Re: Was Darth Stryfe featured in issue 0?|archivedate=20071013022212}}</ref>
